a.xlink:title: Abstract base class for game loop passes.
Game state types submodule.
Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.
Aggregate module re-exporting all engine role concepts.
Type-indexed registry for managing System instances within a game loop pass.
Defines commit points for synchronization within the game loop.
Identifiers for game state transitions.
Game state enumeration and bitmask operations.
Lightweight view for iterating entities with specific components.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Lightweight callable for resolving EntityHandles to GameObjects.
Type-indexed registry for engine resources with O(1) lookup.
Type-safe event bus for inter-system communication within the game loop.
Defines the Level class representing a game level or stage.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
Type alias for entity identifiers within an EntityPool.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.
Generic sparse set data structure for efficient entity-component storage.
Aggregate module for helios::core::data namespace.
Compile-time type identifier for component types.
Component for parent-child entity relationships.
Lightweight GUID (globally unique identifier) implementation.
Tag component indicating an active entity.
Concept constraining types that can handle specific commands.
Concept constraining types eligible for system registration.
Concept for detecting a compile-time engine role tag on a type.
Concept constraining types usable as command buffers.
Concept detecting an optional clear() method.
Concept constraining types eligible for manager registration.
Concept for types that can accept commands via submit().
Concept requiring a per-frame update(UpdateContext&) method.
Concept detecting an optional reset() method.
Concept detecting an optional init(GameWorld&) method.
Unique type identifier for system types.
Type-erased system wrapper using the Concept/Model pattern.
Generic type-indexed registry for type-erased wrappers.
